items.title: Unmissable! Why Thunder-Spurs decider is the biggest game of the NBA season
items.summary: The most anticipated matchup of the 2026 NBA playoffs is going the distance after the San Antonio Spurs beat the Oklahoma City Thunder on Thursday night to level the Western Conference Finals at 3-3.

items.title: Mourinho signs three-year deal to return as Real boss
items.summary: Jose Mourinho signs a three-year deal to become Real Madrid head coach for a second time.

items.title: New Zealand warm up for England Test series by thrashing Ireland
items.summary: New Zealand warmed up for their three-Test series against England with a crushing innings-and-79-run victory over Ireland in a four-day game at Stormont.

items.title: Sooryavanshi, 15, becomes second-fastest player to hit 1,000 IPL runs
items.summary: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi became the joint-second fastest player to reach 1,000 runs in the Indian Premier League on Friday, as he smashed his way to a sensational 96 off 47 deliveries during Rajasthan Royals' qualifying match against Gujarat Titans.

items.title: Champions League final still not free to air despite pressure
items.summary: Fans will need a subscription to watch the Champions League final between Arsenal and PSG after TNT Sports decides against making the match free to air.

items.title: Real Madrid named football's most valuable club
items.summary: Real Madrid are named as the most valuable club in world football, with Barcelona overtaking Manchester United to go second.

items.title: Clarke to lead 'evolution' instead of 'revolution' after signing new deal
